user.title: Configure ML Presence Model
user.description: Connect to an ml2mqtt model. If the model doesn't exist yet it will be created automatically.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the ml2mqtt add-on. Is it running?
error.model_not_found: Model not found and could not be created.

init.title: ML Presence Sensors — {model_name}
init.description: Select which entities to track. **Trigger entities** cause a data push on every state change. **Context entities** are included in the payload but don't trigger a push.
